summary: Tested the Stealth-Keyword SEO feature end-to-end against the live preview backend + UI. 14/14 backend live API tests pass and the Playwright pass on /admin/seo confirms the StealthKeywordsCard renders correctly with all data-testids and the auto-fill flow correctly calls dry_run=true BEFORE confirming and triggering the real write.
critical_code_review_comments: BulkApplyReq uses Pydantic regex pattern, so invalid mode actually returns 422 (FastAPI validation) before reaching the route's ValueError->400 handler. Test accepts both 400/422; not a bug but worth knowing the spec line says '400'.

POST /products/{product_id} with empty list clears keywords by writing an empty string ('hidden_seo_keywords': '') — confirmed acceptable per the existing test_set_product_keywords_clears_when_empty_list. Restore semantics are reliable.
/api/shop/seo/stealth-keywords/collection/{collection} returns {keywords: []} for unknown collections (no 404), which is exactly what the SSR layer wants. ✅
Live preview env DOES NOT run the Express SSR layer (per agent-context-note), so we could not curl rendered HTML to verify meta-tag injection. Will only land on Railway.
test_credentials: admin@test.com / admin123 (super_admin) — login via /admin/login then POST /api/auth/login
seed_data_creation: None. Live tests mutate exactly one tile (per-collection first row) and restore it; collection-wide test uses a sentinel '__TEST_STEALTH_COLLECTION__' name and clears the keyword list at teardown. NO mass mutations were performed (auto-fill always called with ?dry_run=true).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Live API tests live in /app/backend/tests/test_stealth_seo_live.py. They expect REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL set in env (already is) and the seeded admin user at admin@test.com/admin123. The unit-level tests in test_stealth_seo.py (29) still pass against an isolated Mongo db. SSR enrich layer cannot be validated against the preview env — only against a Railway/Express deploy.

live_test_evidence.confirm_dialog_text: Stealth-fill preview: 772 active products scanned · 772 would gain new keywords (+1187 alt-names total) · 0 already covered · 0 skipped (no original_name or supplier_code) · Apply now? (idempotent — safe to re-run)
live_test_evidence.public_anon_endpoint: /api/shop/seo/stealth-keywords/collection/{key} returns 200 with {keywords: []} for unknown collections, 200 with the saved list when set ✅
